title: NASA shares beautiful timelapse of the Psyche spacecraft's view over Mars - Engadget
summary: NASA's Psyche spacecraft is well on its way to its target in the asteroid belt after receiving a gravity assist from Mars in May, and the space agency just shared some incredible images from that brief encounter.
caption: output/2026-07-19/nasa-shares-beautiful-timelapse-of-the-psyche-spacecraft-s-view-over-m.txt
